caption: A man with a shaved head, a beard, and tattoos on his right arm is seated in a recording studio, wearing a white t-shirt and over-ear headphones. He is positioned behind a professional condenser microphone mounted on a boom arm, which bears the text "Rode Podcast" on its support. The background consists of dark grey acoustic foam panels. Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing emphatically with his right hand. In the beginning, his hand is blurred as it moves quickly toward the right side of the frame. He then brings his hand closer to his face, clenching his fist, before extending his arm forward and outward again in a sweeping motion. His facial expression remains intense, with wide eyes and an open mouth, as he continues to talk and gesture during the recording session.
